title: Connect boards automation during import data
excerpt: I noticed some past community conversations about a beta automation that allows you to connect boards for items based on specific criteria during a data import.  Link to post below.  Is this still available, or is there …

posts.author: zack.nolan (Zack Nolan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I noticed some past community conversations about a beta automation that allows you to connect boards for items based on specific criteria during a data import. Link to post below. Is this still available, or is there another way to do this?

How to Import CRM data with automatical filling of related columns (company/contacts/deals) Platform discussions
Hi @schaeferchen Welcome to the Community! At the moment it’s not possible to import into the link to item column. I’m afraid this isn’t supported by our import feature at present. That said, we do have automations that will allow you to automatically link one item to another. In particular you may find it useful to link these items when the item is created (i.e. at the point of importing them). [image] This would just require both boards to have some matching information - for example the…

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @zack.nolan

Not through import but here’s a way to achieve the auto link based on criteria.
We’ve developed an app called Connected Boards Automations. Which allows to run robust automations on connected boards column, here’s how it can be used in this case.

Automatically connecting items based on one or multiple criteria →

Screenshot 2024-08-06 at 16.24.262300×392 27.2 KB

Also worth adding that it also supports -

  1. Automatically removing connecting.
  2. Syncing values between connected items.
  3. Cross-board automations (trigger in the connected board and action in the current board)

You can find it in the monday.com app marketplace in the platform or here - https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000321/connected-boards-automations-

Hope that helps!
